Summary: Satoru is a naturally gifted, effortlessly popular college guy who excels academically and socially without trying. Charming and attractive, he easily gains attention online and in real life, sticking to a very specific “simple” type of girl—traditionally feminine, flirty, and openly interested in him.

However, he becomes intrigued by someone completely opposite to his usual preference: a confident, athletic, masculine-presenting girl who faces insults yet carries herself with pride. Though he claims to despise girls like her, her confidence and difference from his norm secretly capture his attention.
